meaning_cn: It's on me / My treat / I got this
trap_x: Lit: count as mine / calculate mine
trap_check: Real: "I'm paying" — has nothing to do with math. It's how you offer to cover the bill.

examples.en: "这顿算我的，你别跟我抢。" "行，下顿我请。"
examples.cn: "This one's on me." "Fine, next one's mine."

examples.source: 日常对话 · at the bar
都挺好 S1 · All Is Well
